name: GitHub README
description: Mimics the style of GitHub repository README files.

preview.sampleText: The familiar, trusted style of GitHub repository documentation.

classes.h1: text-3xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900 pb-2 border-b border-gray-300
classes.h2: text-2xl font-bold mb-3 text-gray-900 pb-2 border-b border-gray-300
classes.th: border border-gray-200 p-2 bg-gray-50 font-semibold text-gray-900
classes.code: bg-gray-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-gray-800
